Detailed Description

template<class ELFT>
struct llvm::object::Elf_Vernaux_Impl< ELFT >

Elf_Vernaux: This is the structure of auxiliary data in SHT_GNU_verneed section (.gnu.version_r). This structure is identical for ELF32 and ELF64.

Definition at line 249 of file ELFTypes.h.
